channel.title: Go Web Dev on Haorong Xu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Go Web Dev on Haorong Xu's Blog

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi there! I’m Haorong Xu and here is my personal blog. My email is db_haorong@outlook.com. If you have questions or any other ideas about this blog, please send me an email whenever you want. Everyone is welcome to give suggestions or discuss about the stuff in the blog. My CS Life I started my CS(not Counter-Strike, but computer science) life in elementary school. I always have fun with computer programs, it’s my biggest hobby so far.
